title: crotalaria dissitiflora subsp. dissitiflora
intro: Crotalaria dissitiflora subsp. dissitiflora, a plant species belonging to the legume family Fabaceae, is a shrub native to tropical Africa and parts of Asia. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its use in traditional medicine to treat various health issues. Crotalaria dissitiflora subsp. dissitiflora is believed to have health benefits such as anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can help in wound healing, reducing fever, and soothing respiratory issues. The plant is typically prepared as a decoction or infusion, and its seeds and leaves are used in herbal preparations to make teas, tinctures, and poultices.
